mod-setting-name.module-inserter-ex-close-after-load: Close GUI after loading a preset

mod-setting-description.module-inserter-ex-proxies-per-tick: How many item requests to create per tick\nHigher will create requests for a large selection faster, but can cause game slowdown
mod-setting-description.module-inserter-ex-fill-all: Fill all available slots when selecting the module in the first slot
mod-setting-description.module-inserter-ex-slots-before-alt-ui: Max module slot count to show individual buttons for each slot\nWhen there are more slots than this, the alternate UI will be used
